hero.title: Comprehensive Installation and Technical Maintenance
hero.subtitle: Air conditioning, plumbing, electricity, pools, solar energy and more in Mallorca

climatizacion.title: Air Conditioning
climatizacion.description: Installation and maintenance of air conditioning systems, heat pumps, aerothermal systems, and boilers. Split, multisplit, and industrial solutions.

fontaneria.title: Plumbing
fontaneria.description: Drinking water and sanitation systems, leak repairs, faucets, water heaters, boilers, DHW systems, and irrigation.

electricidad.title: Electricity
electricidad.description: Installation of panels, outlets, lighting, home automation, sensors, and certified electrical reports.

piscinas.title: Pool Maintenance
piscinas.description: Inspection, setup, pumps, filters, chlorinators, and winter pool maintenance.

integral.title: Comprehensive Maintenance
integral.description: Contracts for communities and companies. 24h support and monitoring of critical systems.

complementarios.title: Additional Services
complementarios.description: Installation of solar panels, water treatment, irrigation, well pumps, and energy certifications.

about.title: About Us
about.paragraph1: Inebal (Instaladora Eléctrica y Frío Balear) was born with the mission to provide high-quality services in the fields of electrical installations, air conditioning, and industrial refrigeration in Mallorca.
about.paragraph2: As a young company, we are committed to innovation, customer satisfaction, and technical excellence in every project. Our team undergoes constant training to stay up to date with the latest technologies in the industry.
about.paragraph3: Whether for homes, commercial spaces, or industrial facilities, we offer tailor-made solutions with a clear focus: efficiency, safety, and proximity.

footer.description: Inebal is a young company specialized in electrical installations, air conditioning, and industrial refrigeration in Mallorca.
